properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I'd like to stay here longer than mans allotted days And watch the fleeting changes of life's uneven ways But if my savior calls me to that sweet home on high I'll live with Him forever in glory by and by

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: O yes I'll live in glory by and by I'll tell and sing loves story there on high There with my dear redeemer no more to die O yes I'll live in glory by and by

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I want to be of service along this pilgrim way And lead the lost to Jesus as fervently I pray As day by day I travel I'll keep Him ever nigh And live with Him forever in glory by and by

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: The end I know is nearing, by faith I look away To yonder home supernal, the land of endless day I'll cling to you forever and look beyond the sky And spend the endless ages in glory by and by
